## Problem and outcome

## Safety, privacy, and ownership invariants

## Compatibility, migration, and rollback

## Verification evidence

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Race tests
- [ ] Linux integration tests when kernel/network behavior changes
- [ ] Vulnerability/static/secret checks
- [ ] Changelog and operator docs
- [ ] Before/after workload and profiles for performance claims

## Sensitive dependency/control review

- [ ] This does not change WireGuard, netlink, DNS, SSH, firewall, routing,
      crypto, privileges, or release CI; or two independent qualified approvals
      are attached and automatic merge is disabled.
